title: SPORTSPET x Celtic High Bounce Dog Balls | 3 Pack | Premium Rubber Dog Balls for Fetch & Play | Non-Toxic, Floats in Water, Official Club Colours | For Small & Medium Dogs | 60mm
features: OFFICIAL SPORTSPET x CELTIC FC COLLABORATION – A must-have for fans of The Bhoys and their fetch-loving teammates. This 3-pack brings football flair to every dog’s play session.
FLAGSHIP HIGH BOUNCE DESIGN – Built for maximum bounce and responsiveness, perfect for encouraging active play in small to medium dogs.
DOG-SAFE, PREMIUM RUBBER – Made from our trusted natural and Japanese rubber blend, free from harmful PAHs and paraffins.
FLOATS ON WATER, EASY TO CLEAN – Designed for all-weather fetch, with a smooth surface that rinses off easily after outdoor play.
BUILT FOR ACTIVE PLAY – Supports fitness, bonding, and healthy habits with every chase, sprint, and return.
description: Fuel your dog’s energy with the SPORTSPET x Celtic FC High Bounce Balls – a high-performance collaboration for pups who love to chase and fans who live for the roar of Paradise. Designed using our specialist sports ball know-how, these 60mm balls deliver serious bounce and endless fetch-time fun. As our flagship line, the High Bounce is built from a premium blend of natural and Japanese rubbers, combining responsiveness, resilience, and safety. Each ball is made to support active lifestyles—encouraging agility, movement, and joyful interaction between you and your dog. Finished in official club colours and approved by Celtic FC, this set brings a proud nod to The Hoops with every throw. Whether in the garden, park, or on tour, SPORTSPET balls are tested to children’s toy safety standards and made for dogs who play with passion.
